basic_details.job_title: GPSSB Law Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Law from recognized university, Registration with Bar Council of Gujarat and Bar Council of India, CCC+ level computer knowledge, Minimum 5 years practice experience as advocate
qualification.details: Bachelor of Law from a recognized university. Registration with the Bar Council of Gujarat and the Bar Council of India. CCC+ level computer knowledge. Minimum 5 years of practice experience as an advocate.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GPSSB Law Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://gpssb.gujarat.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GPSSB Law Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GPSSB Law Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the GPSSB Law Officer position is 21st June 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Law Officer post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Law Officer position, candidates must possess a Bachelor of Law degree from a recognized university. Additionally, they need to be registered with the Bar Council of Gujarat and the Bar Council of India, possess CCC+ level computer knowledge, and have a minimum of 5 years of practice experience as an advocate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the GPSSB Law Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Law Officer post is 50 years. Specific age relaxations may be applicable as per the government's recruitment rules and policies for certain categories of candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Law Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Law Officer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month. This is a fixed remuneration for the contract period of employment.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the GPSSB Law Officer job?
faq.answer: The application process for the GPSSB Law Officer recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official GPSSB website, fill it out accurately, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates applying for the GPSSB Law Officer recruitment. Both General/OBC and SC/ST candidates are not required to pay any fee to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Law Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Law Officer position at GPSSB typically involves an MCQ Type Competitive Examination followed by an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in both stages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job? Is it permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The GPSSB Law Officer position is offered on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions mentioned in the official recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the GPSSB Law Officer recruitment can be downloaded from the official website of the Gujarat Panchayat Service Selection Board (GPSSB). You can also find a link to the notification in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents with their application form. This typically includes a recent photograph, signature, identity proof, and educational/experience certificates as specified in the official notification.
